title: HP Inc. to Announce Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings on November 21, 2023
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Oct. 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) will present a live audio webcast of a conference call to review financial results for the fourth fiscal quarter and fiscal year ended October 31, 2023 on Tuesday, November 21, 2023 at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT.

title: Malware ‘Meal Kits' Are Helping Attackers Steal Businesses' Lunch, HP Finds
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Oct. 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) today issued its quarterly HP Wolf Security Threat Insights Report, showing that thriving cybercriminal marketplaces are offering low-level attackers the tools needed to bypass detection and infect users.

title: HPE Vs. HPQ: Which Is The Better HP Stock?
text: HP split into two separate companies, HP Inc. and Hewlett Packard Enterprise, in 2015 to focus on PC and server businesses, respectively. Both companies are diversified but HP Inc. has a more strategic focus with consolidated segments and a better growth outlook. HP Inc. has dominant market positions in PC and Hardcopy Peripherals, while Hewlett Packard Enterprise faces intense competition in the server market.

title: High-Performance at Its Core: Introducing the HP Z6 G5 A
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Oct. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, HP unveiled the newest addition to the Z by HP workstation lineup: the HP Z6 G5 A, a cutting-edge desktop workstation designed to meet the demanding needs of virtual production, 3D rendering, AI, and machine learning professionals.

title: HP Inc.: Attractive Growth Tailwinds And Capital Return Story
text: HP Inc. is attractive due to its growth potential and commitment to returning 100% of free cash flow to shareholders. The company's focus on AI-enabled PCs and expansion in the gaming PC market are positive indicators for future growth. Improved profitability and growing Instant Ink subscribers support the long-term prospects of HPQ's Print division.

title: HP (HPQ) Stock Gains on Strong FY24 Outlook, Dividend Hike
text: HP's (HPQ) strong profit forecast for fiscal 2024 and solid long-term outlook reflect that it is positive about recovery in the PC market, which have been hurt by demand slowdown and higher channel inventory.

title: HP Shares Advance After Reporting Solid 2024 Earnings Guidance and a Dividend Increase
text: HP (HPQ) shares advanced after the PC and printer maker reported 2024 earnings guidance in line with estimates and boosted its dividend.

title: HP guidance and dividend hike paint picture of PC optimism
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) has projected its fiscal 2024 earnings to align closely with estimates and has increased its annual dividend, indicating stabilising demand in the personal computer market. Speaking to securities analysts, HP forecasted earnings per share in the range of $2.75 to $3.15 and non-GAAP diluted net EPS in the range of $3.25 to $3.65.

title: HP guidance and dividend hike reflect glimmers of PC optimism
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) has projected its fiscal 2024 earnings to align closely with estimates and has increased its annual dividend, indicating stabilising demand in the personal computer market. Speaking to securities analysts, HP forecasted earnings per share in the range of $2.75 to $3.15 and non-GAAP diluted net EPS in the range of $3.25 to $3.65.

title: HP Shares Rally on Solid Profit Forecast, Dividend Hike
text: The personal computer and printer company laid out both a long-term growth forecast and fiscal 2024 estimates that met or beat Street estimates.

title: HP Inc. Announces Fiscal 2024 Financial Outlook and Raises Annual Dividend by 5% to $1.10 per Share
text: News highlights: Estimates GAAP diluted net earnings per share (“EPS”) for fiscal 2024 of $2.75 to $3.15 Estimates non-GAAP diluted net EPS for fiscal 2024 of $3.25 to $3.65 Estimates fiscal 2024 free cash flow of $3.1 to $3.6 billion Expects to return approximately 100% of fiscal 2024 free cash flow to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases Announces dividend increase of 5% Estimates $200 million increase in Future Ready plan annualized gross run rate structural cost savings, to $1.6 billion by the end of fiscal 2025. PALO ALTO, Calif.

title: Spooky Season: 7 Stocks Scaring Away Gains This October

title: Insider trading alert: Warren Buffett dumps another 3 million HP shares
text: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK.A) has recently offloaded a substantial 3.1 million shares of HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ), at an average price of $26.2 per share for a total of $80.4 million (Pre Tax).

title: Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway ploughs on with HP disposal
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.B) continues to exit its position in HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ), with another $83 million in common stock jettisoned from its portfolio, according to a Thursday regulatory filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The Oracle of Omaha has now sold nearly $132 million in HP shares since the start of October, bringing his stake in the personal computer developer to less than 10%.

title: Buffet's Berkshire Hathaway ploughs on with HP disposal
text: Warren Buffet's Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.B) continues to exit its position in HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ), with another $83 million in common stock jettisoned from its portfolio, according to a Thursday regulatory filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The Oracle of Omaha has now sold nearly $132 million in HP shares since the start of October, bringing his stake in the personal computer developer to less than 10%.

title: Berkshire Sells More HP Stock, Drops Below 10% Threshold
text: Berkshire Hathaway sold 3.1 million shares on Tuesday and now holds 97.9 million shares of the PC and printer maker, a 9.9% stake worth $2.6 billion.

title: HP stock rises following a double upgrade ahead of investor meeting
text: HP Inc.'s stock stood out as a gainer Tuesday, amid a selloff in the technology sector and the broader stock market, after it received a double upgrade from an analyst who laid out a bullish scenario for the personal computer and printer maker ahead of next week's investor meeting.

title: HP Stock Is Double Upgraded. An Improving PC Market Is Just One Reason Why.
text: BofA Securities analyst Wamsi Mohan double upgraded shares of HP to Buy from Underperform.

title: Bank of America disagrees with Warren Buffett on HP Inc
text: Warren Buffett doesn't seem to be slowing down the pace of unloading his stake in HP Inc (NYSE: HPQ). His conglomerate has sold another 14.5 million shares of the PC maker over the past nine days.

title: HP (HPQ) & Google Partner for Make-in-India Chromebooks

title: HPQ Stock Alert: HP Just Scored a Double Upgrade From Bank of America
text: HP (NYSE: HPQ ) stock is sitting pretty on Tuesday after the company got a double upgrade from Bank of America analyst analyst Wamsi Mohan. The good news for HPQ stock today starts with the Bank of America analyst upgrading it from an “underperform” rating to a “buy” rating.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has now cashed in $540 million of HP stock in under a month
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway sold another $130 million of HP shares in three days. The investor's company has now cashed in about $540 million of the computing stock in under a month.

title: Berkshire Sells More HP Stock. Here's How Much It Has Left.
text: Berkshire Hathaway sold 5.1 million shares in recent days and now holds 100.9 million shares, a 10.2% stake in the maker of printers and PCs
